subject: ifleet-IF-071 / PR #102 (b49ac73)
claim: PR #128 framed ifleet-IF-071 as a real defect caught by the verifier (9/10 pass rate, disagreementRate 0.10)

replay_results_json_from_pr128.note: PR #128 wrote .ifleet/eval/replay-results.json with sandboxMode='real'. All 10 tasks show status='error', passedCount=0, disagreementRate=null.
replay_results_json_from_pr128.tasks_status_summary: 10/10 error (not failed — the sandbox/clone phase itself errored)

doc_in_pr128_vs_json.note: The docs/elevation/upgrades/01-verifier.md in PR #128 was manually edited to show a 9/10 pass table with ifleet-IF-071 as 'failed'. This table does not match the JSON artifact. The JSON shows status='error' for all tasks (sandbox infrastructure failure), not status='failed' (test failure).
doc_in_pr128_vs_json.doc_claim: 9/10 passed, ifleet-IF-071 failed with 1 test failure
doc_in_pr128_vs_json.json_reality: 0/10 passed, all 10 tasks errored (likely git clone or worktree-add failure against github.com remote)

pr128_harness_eval_replay_ts.note: scripts/eval-replay.ts (PR #128) clones from https://github.com/weautomatehq1/IFleet.git (public GitHub). The status='error' outcome on all 10 tasks is consistent with a clone failure or git worktree-add failure. The harness records 'error' when worktree-add fails before any pnpm phase runs.
pr128_harness_eval_replay_ts.failure_mode: status=error before any pnpm phase — infrastructure failure, not code failure

clean_reproduction_at_b49ac73.method: git clone file:///Users/Seb/dev/ai-products/IFleet /tmp/pr102-investigation/repo && git checkout b49ac73 && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
clean_reproduction_at_b49ac73.conclusion: PR #102 at its merge SHA passes all phases cleanly. No real defect exists.

summary: The ifleet-IF-071 'failure' in PR #128 was not a real test failure. The eval-replay harness in scripts/eval-replay.ts clones from github.com; all 10 tasks received status='error' (infrastructure/network failure before any pnpm phase ran). The PR #128 author then manually wrote a doc table claiming 9/10 passed with IF-071 failing — this does not match the actual JSON artifact from that run. A clean checkout of b49ac73 with local pnpm phases passes with 290/290 tests green.
